name: Cub Creek Park - Wilkesboro
description: Cub Creek Park - Wilkesboro is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wilkesboro, NC. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: First United Methodist Church
description: First United Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in North Wilkesboro, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: The Luckydog Club
description: Come play pickleball at The Luckydog Club in North Wilkesboro, NC! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are private. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.

name: Wilkesboro Church Of Christ
description: Wilkesboro Church Of Christ is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wilkesboro, NC. There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Wilkes Family YMCA
description: Wilkes Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wilkesboro, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Wilkes Senior Center
description: Wilkes Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Wilkesboro, NC. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.
